---
title: "slimnine examples"
listing:
  - id: example-list
    contents: examples/*.qmd
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    sort: title
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

Worked examples for the [slimnine](https://github.com/peteD900/slimnine)
plotting helpers, run against the bundled synthetic wafer dataset.

::: {#example-list}
:::

## Rendering

From the repo root, with the project venv active:

```bash
uv run quarto render docs           # render the whole site to docs/_site
uv run quarto preview docs          # live preview on localhost
uv run quarto render docs/examples/wafer_maps.qmd   # one document
```
